mapper.insert: insert into LEARNING_DATA (DATA_NAME, SELECT_CON, HDQR_BOB_DCD, REG_ID, REG_DT, MOD_ID, MOD_DT, START_DT, END_DT, TEMPLATE_ID, LEARNING_TYPE, SCHED_ID) values (#{dataName}, #{selectCon}, #{hdqrBobDcd}, #{memId}, current_timestamp(), #{memId}, current_timestamp(), #{startDt}, #{endDt}, #{templateId}, #{learningType}, #{schedId});
mapper.update: update LEARNING_DATA set DATA_NAME = #{dataName}, SELECT_CON = #{selectCon}, HDQR_BOB_DCD = #{hdqrBobDcd}, MOD_ID = #{memId}, MOD_DT = current_timestamp(), START_DT = #{startDt}, END_DT = #{endDt}, TEMPLATE_ID = #{templateId} where ID = #{id};

update LEARNING_DATA ld set TEMPLATE_ID = null where ld.TEMPLATE_ID in
#{item}
update LEARNING_DATA ld set SCHED_ID = null where ld.SCHED_ID = #{schedId}
mapper.select: select count(*) from LEARNING_DATA ld inner join HC_MEMBER hm on ld.REG_ID = hm.MEM_ID left join TEMPLATE t on ld.TEMPLATE_ID = t.ID

select
, t.TEMPLATE_NAME , hm.MEM_NAME as regName , model.modelCnt from LEARNING_DATA ld inner join HC_MEMBER hm on ld.REG_ID = hm.MEM_ID left join TEMPLATE t on ld.TEMPLATE_ID = t.ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT count(*) AS modelCnt, lm.LEARNING_ID FROM LEARNING_MODEL lm WHERE lm.DELETE_YN = 'N' GROUP BY lm.LEARNING_ID ) model ON ld.ID = model.LEARNING_ID
order by REG_DT
ASC
DESC

select
from LEARNING_DATA ld where ld.ID = #{id}
select count(*) from LEARNING_DATA ld where ld.DATA_NAME = #{dataName}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM LEARNING_DATA WHERE ID IN
#{item}
